content.title: Getting Started
content.description:
A quick orientation for new users. Everything you need to start using Hobson — the rest you can discover from within the system itself.

---

## Everything Is an Item

In Hobson, there are no files, folders, or apps — just **items**. Notes, tasks, code, views, types, even this documentation — all items. Every item has a type, a set of content fields, and can link to other items. This uniformity means you only need to learn one set of interactions.

## The Spatial Canvas

When you open Hobson, you're looking at the [spatial canvas](item://ef793c27-2d4b-4c99-b05a-2769db5bc5a9) — a freeform workspace where items appear as draggable, resizable windows. Think of it as an infinite desk where you arrange your stuff.

## Right-Click Everything

The **context menu** is your primary tool. Right-click on any item (remember, everything is an item) — to see actions: edit, delete, change view, inspect, and more

When in doubt, right-click. The menu is context-sensitive and will show you what's possible. See [Context Menus](item://c0c0c0c0-0034-0000-0000-000000000000) for details.

## Creating Items

Right-click and choose **Add Item** > **New Item**. Pick a type (note, task, or any custom type) and a new item appears on the canvas.

## Navigating Into Items

Items can contain other items via [attachments](item://c0c0c0c0-0005-0000-0000-000000000000). Use an item's context menu to **navigate into** it, making it the root of your canvas. See [Navigation](item://c0c0c0c0-0003-0000-0000-000000000000).

## Links and Transclusion

Items can reference each other in two ways:

- **Links** — In any markdown field, write `[link text](item://guid)` to create a clickable link to another item.
- **Transclusion** — Write `![](item://guid)` to **embed** another item inline, rendered live with its own view.

Transclusion can also target specific fields or line ranges. See [Transclusion](item://c0c0c0c0-0035-0000-0000-000000000000) for the full syntax.

## Tags and Related Items

Any item can act as a [tag](item://c0c0c0c0-0021-0000-0000-000000000000). Tagging is lightweight classification — add tags via an item's edit view. Tags help you find and filter items without imposing a rigid hierarchy. The **Related Items** item show everything that is somehow connected to the currently selected item.

## Search

Press **Cmd+K** (or Ctrl+K) to open the **item palette** — a fast search over all items by name. Start typing to filter, then press Enter to add it to your canvas.

## The REPL

Press **Esc** to toggle the [REPL](item://c0c0c0c0-0008-0000-0000-000000000000) — an interactive console with full access to the kernel API. You can query items, create them programmatically, test code, or inspect system state. It's entirely optional for day-to-day use, but powerful when you need it.

## Safe Mode

If something goes wrong (a bad code item, a broken view), add `?safe=1` to the URL. This boots only the kernel — no user code runs — so you can fix or delete the offending item. See [URL Parameters](item://c0c0c0c0-0031-0000-0000-000000000000).

## Where to Go From Here

If you want examples of what it can do:

- [Symbol Browser & API Help](item://c0c0c0c0-0052-0000-0000-000000000000) - explore the code and jump straight to the implementation
- [element-inspector](item://eeee0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001) - see exactly what code generated any visual element on the screen.
- [Test Suite](item://56a2c83c-1fd4-4db7-a3e8-3aa152524721) - some automated tests that run within a [Nested Hobson Instance](item://c0c0c0c0-0037-0000-0000-000000000000)

If you want to browse all the features, open the [feature](item://a63eadd8-ec56-4163-acf2-207aa392069b) tag and click on it to see lots of useful related material in the "Related Items" on the right.
 
Some suggestions for a technical overview:

- [Core Concepts](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000002) — Items, types, code, libraries, views
- [Architecture Overview](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000003) — How the system is built
- [Philosophy & Inspirations](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000001) — Why Hobson works the way it does
- [Views & Rendering](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000004) — How items get displayed, and how to build custom views

If you want to browse technical concepts, open the [concept](item://bff75873-edb8-412e-81c9-c744e68fe29f) tag and click on it to see lots of useful related material in the "Related Items" on the right.
